visualizerParams.title: Bug Squasher: Variables
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The Go program for variables has a bug. Find and fix it.
visualizerParams.buggyCode:
package primary

import "fmt"

func main() {
	var name string = "CodeVarsity"
	age := 5
	isLearning := true

	fmt.Printf("Name: %s, Age: %d, Learning: %t\n", name, age, isLearning)
}

solution.code:
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	var name string = "CodeVarsity"
	age := 5
	isLearning := true

	fmt.Printf("Name: %s, Age: %d, Learning: %t\n", name, age, isLearning)
}
solution.explanation: Fixed the incorrect syntax or method call.
